text: Failure of the driver of a motor vehicle carrying any passenger for hire to stop as required in Section 22452 shall not be imputed to any bona fide passenger for hire in such vehicle.

# Vehicle Code
## Division 11. RULES OF THE ROAD [21000 - 23336]
### Chapter 8. Special Stops Required [22450 - 22456]
##### § 22453

Failure of the driver of a motor vehicle carrying any passenger for hire to stop as required in Section 22452 shall not be imputed to any bona fide passenger for hire in such vehicle.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: Failure of the driver of a motor vehicle carrying any passenger for hire to stop as required in Section 22452 shall not be imputed to any bona fide passenger for hire in such vehicle.
